_how: Quantitative values are copied from results/*.json (source noted). Structural criteria are yes/no facts about the diff, each with a citation. Scores are computed by scoring/rubric.py — run: python scripts/scoring/score.py references/examples/<name> (from the plugin root).

correctness.source: smoke_test.py: call_option_jit raises NameError ('err' undefined) => does not build. equivalence_x64_False.json worst=1.02e-2; equivalence_x64_True.json worst~1e-11

efficiency.source: as_used_total.py (bug-patched to run): numpy 0.18s / jax 1.05s = 0.17x; scaling.json: JAX only wins at n>=250, lecture uses n=5,25

ergonomics.source: results/static_metrics.json: `err, v = f_jit(ap); err.throw()`; checkify (err,val) contract is easy to misuse (the shipped bug proves it)

citations.pure_no_order_dependence: immutable NamedTuples + factory functions replace the mutable class
citations.no_global_state: create_ap_model uses a local n; original __init__ referenced module-global n
citations.fixes_prior_bugs: removes global-n reliance; extracts pure test_stability
citations.introduces_correctness_bug: TRUE (override->cap 3): stray err.throw() in call_option (undefined err) is a build-breaking defect

citations.correct_control_flow_primitive: TRUE: lax.while_loop (infinite option) and fori_loop (finite) are the right primitives for genuinely iterative solvers
citations.no_anti_idiomatic_constructs: TRUE: checkify is the idiomatic jit-safe runtime check
citations.clean_call_sites_and_naming: FALSE: every call site carries (err,val) unpack + err.throw() ceremony

citations.no_footgun_for_editors: FALSE: checkify (err,val) return-contract already produced the shipped NameError
citations.robust_no_brittle_conditions: FALSE: exercise spectral radius 1.0618 vs 1/beta 1.0638 (margin 0.002) is fragile under float32
